name: MIDGUT VOLVULUS
definition: torsion of entire gut around SMA

demographics.Age: most common in neonate / young infant (= acute intestinal obstruction); occasionally in

dominant_finding: inability to visualize 3rd part of duodenum across midline from right to left
distribution: SMV to left of / posterior to SMA = transposition / reversal of SMA-to-SMV relationship
discriminating_features: dilated air-filled duodenal bulb + paucity of gas distally
"double bubble" sign = air-fluid levels in stomach + duodenum
isolated collection of gas-containing bowel loops distal to obstructed duodenum = gas-
vertically oriented duodenum that does NOT cross midline with most of small bowel on
dilated proximal duodenum terminates in a distinctive conical / beaked shape
